title: Unexpected Left Join Crash
description: I performed some kind of join, but the left join crashed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50), c3 DATE);
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 INT, c5 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, TRUE), (2, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.c1 = t2.c4;
key_bug_features: Left join with EXISTS condition causes crash
